CollectionMetadata

Description

Metadata information about a collection

Fields
Field Name Description
downloadedAt - DateTime<= /code> A timestamp indicating the first time the user= downloaded this collection
endorsementValue - Int= A positive value indicates an endorsement by t= he user, while a negative value indicates abstention (will be null if the u= ser has not endorsed the collection)
latestDownloadedRevisionNumber - Int The latest revision number downloaded by the u= ser for this collection
Example
{
  "downloadedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "endorsementValue": 987,
  "latestDownloadedRevisionNumber": 987
}
Types<= /a>

CollectionPage

Fields
Field Name Description
facets - [NodesFacet= !] Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested.
facetsData - JSON= Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested. Schema is {"facetName":{"facetValue":count}}
nodes - [Collection!]!= Nodes for pagination
nodesCount - Int!<= /span> Number of nodes returned by this query
nodesFacets - [NodesFa= cet!] Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested.
nodesFilter - String String representation of the filter query used= to locate the nodes.
totalCount - Int!<= /span> Total number of collections found.
Example
{
  "facets": [NodesFacet],
  "facetsData": {},
  "nodes"=
: [Collection],
  "nodesCount": 987,
  "nodesFacets": [NodesFacet],
  "nodesFilter": "xyz789",
  "totalCount": 123
}
Types<= /a>

CollectionPayload

Description

The data payload used to create a collection revision<= /p>

Fields
Input Field Description
adultContent<= /code> - Boolean! Whether the collection includes adult content =
collectionMan= ifest - CollectionManifest!= Collection manifest
collectionSch= emaId - Int! Collection schema ID (Default: 1)
Example
{
  "adultContent": t=
rue,
  "collectionManifest": CollectionManifest=
,
  "collectionSchemaId": 987
}
Types<= /a>

CollectionRevision

Description

An immutable revision of a collection

Fields
Field Name Description
adultContent - Boolean! If true, this revision could contain adult con= tent and needs to be treated accordingly
assetsSizeBytes - = BigInt!<= /code> The size of bundled assets within the revision= in bytes
badges - [Badge!]!= Badges associated with this collection revisio= n
collection - Collectio= n! Gets the collection that this revision belongs= to. This will ignore adult_content flags.
collectionChangelog - CollectionChangelog A changelog attached to a collection revision =
collectionId - Int! The database ID for this collection.
collectionSchema - CollectionSchema! A model of the expected structure for a collec= tion manifest
collectionSchemaId - Int! The database ID for this collection schema.
contentPreviewLink - Strin= g! The link to generate a content preview for the= revision
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this revision was first created. =
discardedAt - DateTime Time of when this revision was discarded.
downloadLink - String! The download link for the revision
externalResources - [ExternalResource!]! Array of external resources referenced by this= revision
fileSize - BigInt! The total size of the revision in bytes Use "totalSize" instead.
gameVersions - [GameV= ersion!] A list of game versions for which the revision= has been confirmed to work (usually the game version for which the revisio= n was created)
id - Int! The database ID for this revision.
installationInfo - String<= /code> Additional information about the installation = process of this revision
latest - Boolean! Will be true if the revision is the latest pub= lished for the collection
metadata - <= code>CollectionRevisionMetadata Metadata information about a collection revisi= on
modAuthors - UserC= onnection! List of authors of the mods included in this r= evision ordered (DESC) by the number of mods in the revision.
Argument= s
after - Stri= ng

Returns the elements in the list that co= me after the specified cursor.

before - Str= ing

Returns the elements in the list that co= me before the specified cursor.

first - Int

Returns the first n elements fr= om the list.

last - Int

Returns the last n elements fro= m the list.
modCount - Int! The number of mods and external resources in t= his collection
modFiles - = [CollectionRevisionMod!]! A list of mod files included in the revision <= /td>
overallRating - String An average taken from all ratings for this rev= ision
overallRatingCount - Int A count of all ratings for this revision
rating - AverageRating! Average rating for a single revision and total= number of votes Deprecated in favour of= 'overallRating' and 'overallRatingCount'
retractionReason - RetractionReason A reason for which a revision has been retract= ed.
revision - Int! The revision number Use "revisionNumber" instead.
revisionNumber - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Int">Int!<= /a> The revision number
revisionStatus - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-String">String! The status of this revision. Possible values a= re 'draft', 'published' or 'retracted'
status - String!<= /a> The status of this revision. Possible values a= re 'draft', 'published' or 'retracted'
totalDownloads - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Int">Int!<= /a> The total number of times the revision has bee= n downloaded
totalSize - BigInt!= The total size of the revision in bytes
uniqueDownloads - = Int!= The number of unique users who have download t= he revision
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this revision was last updated. <= /td>
Example
{
  "adultContent": t=
rue,
  "assetsSizeBytes": {},
  "badges": [Badge],
  "collection": Collection,
  "collectionChangelog": CollectionChangelog,
  "collectionId": 987,
  "collectionSchema": CollectionSchema,
  "collectionSchemaId": 987,
  "contentPreviewLink": "abc123",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "discardedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "downloadLink": "abc123",
  "externalResources": [ExternalResource]<=
/span>,
  "fileSize": {},
  "gameVersions": [GameVersion],
  "id": 987,
  "installationInfo": "xyz789",
  "latest": false,
  "metadata": CollectionRevisionMetadata,
  "modAuthors": UserConnection,
  "modCount": 987,
  "modFiles": [CollectionRevisionMod]=
,
  "overallRating": "abc123",
  "overallRatingCount": 123,
  "rating": AverageRating,
  "retractionReason": RetractionReason,
  "revision": 123,
  "revisionNumber": 123,
  "revisionStatus": "abc123",
  "status": "xyz789",
  "totalDownloads": 123,
  "totalSize": {},
  "uniqueDownloads": 987,
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z"
}
Types<= /a>

CollectionRevisionMetadata
Description

Metadata information about a collection revision

Fields
Field Name Description
downloadedAt - DateTime<= /code> A timestamp indicating the first time the user= downloaded this revision
ratingValue - Ratin= gOptions Indicates the rating given by the user to a re= vision
Example
{
  "downloadedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "ratingValue": "positive"
}

Types<= /a>

CollectionRevisionMod

Description

A mod file included in a collection

Fields
Field Name Description
collectionRevisionId - Int! The id of the collection revision including th= e mod file
file - ModFile= The mod file
fileId - Int! The mod file's id
gameId - Int! The game id for the mod file
id - ID! The database ID for this collection revision m= od.
optional - Boolean! Whether the mod file is required for the colle= ction
updatePolicy - String! Indicates to mod managers how they should hand= le automatic updates
version - String!<= /a> The mod file version
Example
{
  "collectionRevisionId": 123,
  "file":=
 ModFile,
  "fileId": 987,
  "gameId": 987,
  "id": "4",
  "optional": false=
,
  "updatePolicy": "xyz789",
  "version": "abc123"
}
Types<= /a>

CollectionSchema

Description

A model of the expected structure for a collection man= ifest

Fields
Field Name Description
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this collection schema was first = created.
id - Int! The database ID for this collection schema.
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this collection schema was last u= pdated.
version - String!<= /a> Schema version for the collection manifest for= mat
Example
{
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "id": 987,
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "version": "xyz789"
}

CollectionStatus

Description

Available collection statuses

Values
Enum Value Description

listed

 Publicly visible

unlisted

 Does not appear in lists

under_moderation

 Under moderation

discarded

 Discarded
Example
"listed"
Types<= /a>

Videos related to a collection

,

: "xyz789",

: "xyz789",

 User

CollectionsFacet

Description

Facet fields specific to the Collections query.

Fields
Input Field Description
adultContent<= /code> - [String!] Facet on adult content.
categoryName<= /code> - [String!] Facet on category.
collectionRat= ing - [String!] Facet on ratings.
collectionSta= tus - [String!] Facet on status.
gameName - [String!] Facet on game name.
gameIds - [String!] Facet on game ID.
gameVersion - [String!] Facet on game versions.
tag - [String!] Facet on collection tags.
badges= - [String!] Facet on collection badges.
schemaId - [String!] Facet on collection schema (1 =3D Vortex, 2 = =3D Wabbajack).
Example
{
  "adultContent": ["abc123"],
  "categoryName": ["abc123"],
  "collectionRating": ["xyz789"],
  "collectionStatus": ["abc123"],
  "gameName": ["xyz789"],
  "gameIds": ["xyz789"],
  "gameVersion": ["abc123"],
  "tag":<=
/span> ["abc123"],
  "badges": ["xyz789"],
  "schemaId": ["xyz789"]
}
Types<= /a>

CollectionsFilter

Description

Common filter fields specific to the Collections query=

Fields
Input Field Description
filter= - [CollectionsFilter!]<= /span> Nested filters.
op - FilterLogicalOperator= Logical operator for clauses.
name - [BaseFilterValue!] Collection Name
collectionRat= ing - [BaseFilterValue!] Collection Rating
collectionSta= tus - [BaseFilterValue!] Status of the collection. Valid values are: "u= nlisted", "under_moderation" (moderators/admins only), "discarded" (moderat= ors/admins only).
gameId= - [BaseFilterValue!] Game ID
gameDomain - [BaseFilterValue!]<= /span> Game domain name E.g. skyrim
gameName - [BaseFilterValue!] Game name E.g. Skyrim
categoryId - [BaseFilterValue!]<= /span> Category ID
categoryName<= /code> - [BaseFilterValue!] Category name
gameVersion - [BaseFilterValue!]= Filter collections for specific game versions =
modUid= - [BaseFilterValue!] The mod unique identifier.
tag - [BaseFilterValue!] The tag name, exact match.
adultContent<= /code> - [BooleanFilterValue!] Whether to show adult content in search result= s
hasDraftRevis= ion - [BooleanFilterValue!]= Only show collections that have a draft revisi= on
hasPublishedR= evision - [BooleanFilterVal= ue!] Only show collections that have a published re= vision
generalSearch= - [Collect= ionGeneralSearchFilterValue!] Text search on name, summary and description, = partial match.
Example
{
  "filter": [CollectionsFilter],
  "op": "AND",
  "name":=
 [BaseFilterValue],
  "collectionRating": [BaseFilterValue],
  "collectionStatus": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameId": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameDomain": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameName": [BaseFilterValue],
  "categoryId": [BaseFilterValue],
  "categoryName": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameVersion": [BaseFilterValue],
  "modUid": [BaseFilterValue],
  "tag":<=
/span> [BaseFilterValue],
  "adultContent": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "hasDraftRevision": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "hasPublishedRevision": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "generalSearch": [CollectionGeneralSearchFilterValue]
}
Types<= /a>

CollectionsSearchFilter

Description

Common filter fields specific to the Collections query=

Fields
Input Field Description
filter= - [CollectionsSearchFilter!]= Nested filters.
op - FilterLogicalOperator= Logical operator for clauses.
userId= - [BaseFilterValue!] Author ID
name - [BaseFilterValue!] Collection Name
collectionRat= ing - [BaseFilterValue!] Collection Rating
recentRating<= /code> - [FloatFilterValue!]<= /a> A 30 day average of all revision ratings
recentRatingC= ount - [IntFilterValue!]= Total number of ratings given in the last 30 d= ays
createdAt - [BaseFilterValue!] Created at date
updatedAt - [BaseFilterValue!] Updated at date
collectionSta= tus - [BaseFilterValue!] Collection Status
gameId= - [BaseFilterValue!] Game ID
gameDomain - [BaseFilterValue!]<= /span> Game domain name E.g. skyrim
gameName - [BaseFilterValue!] Game name E.g. Skyrim
categoryId - [BaseFilterValue!]<= /span> Category ID
categoryName<= /code> - [BaseFilterValue!] Category name
gameVersion - [BaseFilterValue!]= Filter collections for specific game versions =
modUid= - [BaseFilterValue!] The mod unique identifier.
tag - [BaseFilterValue!] The tag name, exact match.
adultContent<= /code> - [BooleanFilterValue!] Whether to show adult content in search result= s
hasDraftRevis= ion - [BooleanFilterValue!]= Only show collections that have a draft revisi= on
hasPublishedR= evision - [BooleanFilterVal= ue!] Only show collections that have a published re= vision
schemaId - [IntFilterValue!] Filter by collection schema ID (1 =3D Vortex, = 2 =3D Wabbajack)
badges= - [ExistsFilter!] Filter collections that have (or do not have) = badges assigned
generalSearch= - [Collect= ionGeneralSearchFilterValue!] Text search on name, summary and description, = partial match.
Example
{
  "filter": [CollectionsSearchFilter]=
,
  "op": "AND",
  "userId": [BaseFilterValue],
  "name":=
 [BaseFilterValue],
  "collectionRating": [BaseFilterValue],
  "recentRating": [FloatFilterValue]<=
span class=3D"hljs-punctuation">,
  "recentRatingCount": [IntFilterValue],
  "createdAt": [BaseFilterValue],
  "updatedAt": [BaseFilterValue],
  "collectionStatus": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameId": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameDomain": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameName": [BaseFilterValue],
  "categoryId": [BaseFilterValue],
  "categoryName": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameVersion": [BaseFilterValue],
  "modUid": [BaseFilterValue],
  "tag":<=
/span> [BaseFilterValue],
  "adultContent": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "hasDraftRevision": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "hasPublishedRevision": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "schemaId": [IntFilterValue],
  "badges": [ExistsFilter],
  "generalSearch": [CollectionGeneralSearchFilterValue]
}
Types<= /a>

CollectionsSearchSort

Description

Sort fields specific to a Collections query.

Fields
Input Field Description
relevance - BaseSortValue Filter query relevance, works best with non wi= ldcard queries.
createdAt - BaseSortValue Created at date
updatedAt - BaseSortValue Updated at date
endorsements<= /code> - BaseSortValue Endorsements count
downloads - BaseSortValue Downloads count
rating= - BaseSortValue Overall rating
recentRating<= /code> - BaseSortValue Recent rating
Example
{
  "relevance": BaseSortValue,
  "createdAt": BaseSortValue,
  "updatedAt": BaseSortValue,
  "endorsements": BaseSortValue,
  "downloads": BaseSortValue,
  "rating": BaseSortValue,
  "recentRating": BaseSortValue
}
Types<= /a>

Comment

Description

A comment.

Fields
Field Name Description
attachments - [Attachm= ent!] The attachment filename and IDs
body - String!<= /span> The content of the latest revision for this co= mment.
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this comment was first created. <= /td>
creator - User!<= /span> The user that created this comment.
cursor - String!<= /a> The pagination cursor for this comment.
discardedAt - DateTime Time of when this comment was discarded.
discardedBy - User The user that discarded this comment.
hiddenAt - DateTime Time of when this comment was hidden.
hiddenBy - User The user that hid this comment.
hiddenInternalReason - Str= ing The internal reason why this comment was hidde= n. Only accessible to admins and moderators.
hiddenReason - String The public reason why this comment was hidden.=
id - ID! The database ID for this comment.
isDiscarded - Boolean! Returns a boolean indicating whether this comm= ent is discarded.
isPinned - Boolean! Is this a pinned comment
likesCount - Int!<= /span> Comment likes count.
lockedAt - DateTime Time of when this comment was locked.
lockedBy - User The user that locked this comment.
moderatedByAdmin - Boolea= n! Returns a boolean indicating whether this comm= ent was moderated by an admin.
moderationJwt - String! JWT token for submitting moderation reports
moderationStatus - CommentModerationStatus! The moderation status of this comment.
parent - Comment= The parent comment.
pinPriority - Int<= /span> The user that pinned this comment.
pinnedBy - User User which pinned the comment
pinnedByAdmin - Boolean!<= /code> Returns a boolean indicating whether this comm= ent was pinned by an admin.
replies - Comm= entConnection! A list of replies to this comment.
Argument= s
after - Stri= ng

Returns the elements in the list that co= me after the specified cursor.

before - Str= ing

Returns the elements in the list that co= me before the specified cursor.

first - Int

Returns the first n elements fr= om the list.

last - Int

Returns the last n elements fro= m the list.
revisions - [Comm= entRevision!]! The revisions of this comment.
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this comment was last updated.
viewerHasIgnored - Boolea= n! Whether the viewer has ignored the content own= er.
viewerHasLiked - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Boolean">Boolean!= Returns a boolean indicating whether the viewi= ng user has liked this comment.
Example
{
  "attachments": [Attachment],
  "body":=
 "xyz789",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "creator": User,
  "cursor": "abc123",
  "discardedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "discardedBy": User,
  "hiddenAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "hiddenBy": User,
  "hiddenInternalReason": "abc123",
  "hiddenReason": "xyz789",
  "id": "4",
  "isDiscarded": tr=
ue,
  "isPinned": true<=
/span>,
  "likesCount": 123,
  "lockedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "lockedBy": User,
  "moderatedByAdmin": false,
  "moderationJwt": "abc123",
  "moderationStatus": "none",
  "parent": Comment,
  "pinPriority": 987,
  "pinnedBy": User,
  "pinnedByAdmin": =
true,
  "replies": CommentConnection,
  "revisions": [CommentRevision],
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "viewerHasIgnored": false,
  "viewerHasLiked": true
}
Types<= /a>

CommentConnection

Description

The connection type for Comment.

Fields
Field Name Description
edges - [CommentEdge]= A list of edges.
nodes - [Comment]<= /a> A list of nodes.
pageInfo - PageInfo! Information to aid in pagination.
totalCount - Int!<= /span> Total # of objects returned from this Plural Q= uery
Example
{
  "edges"=
: [CommentEdge],
  "nodes"=
: [Comment],
  "pageInfo": PageInfo,
  "totalCount": 987
}
Types<= /a>

CommentEdge

Description

An edge in a connection.

Fields
Field Name Description
cursor - String!<= /a> A cursor for use in pagination.
node - Comment= The item at the end of the edge.
Example
{
  "cursor": "abc123",
  "node":=
 Comment
}
Types<= /a>

CommentModerationStatus

Description

Enum for available moderation states: "none", "hidden"= , "locked"

Values
Enum Value Description

none

 The comment is not under moderation.

hidden

 The comment cannot be viewed.

locked

 The comment cannot be interacted with.
Example
"none"
Types<= /a>

CommentRevision

Description

A comment revision.

Fields
Field Name Description
body - String!<= /span> The content of this revision.
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this revision was first created. =
id - ID! ID of the object.
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this revision was last updated. <= /td>
Example
{
  "body":=
 "xyz789",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "id": "4",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z"
}
Types<= /a>

CommentSearchResultConnection<= /h2>
Description

The connection type for Comment.

Fields
Field Name Description
edges - [= CommentSearchResultEdge] A list of edges.
nodes - [Comment]<= /a> A list of nodes.
pageInfo - PageInfo! Information to aid in pagination.
timeTaken - Int! Time taken to complete the search in milliseco= nds.
totalCount - Int!<= /span> Total number of results.
Example
{
  "edges"=
: [CommentSearchResultEdge]<=
span class=3D"hljs-punctuation">,
  "nodes"=
: [Comment],
  "pageInfo": PageInfo,
  "timeTaken": 987,
  "totalCount": 987
}

Types<= /a>

CommentSearchResultEdge

Description

A comment search result edge.

Fields
Field Name Description
cursor - String!<= /a> A cursor for use in pagination.
node - Comment= The item at the end of the edge.
relevance - Float! The relevancy score of the result. Higher scor= es mean more relevance.
Example
{
  "cursor": "abc123",
  "node":=
 Comment,
  "relevance": 987.65
}
Types<= /a>

CommentThread

Description

A comment thread.

Fields
Field Name Description
comments - Comm= entConnection! Look up comments.
Argument= s
sortBy - Str= ing

Sort results by

sortDirection - String

Sort direction

after - Stri= ng

Returns the elements in the list that co= me after the specified cursor.

before - Str= ing

Returns the elements in the list that co= me before the specified cursor.

first - Int

Returns the first n elements fr= om the list.

last - Int

Returns the last n elements fro= m the list.
id - ID! The database ID for this comment thread.
lockedAt - DateTime Time of when this comment thread was locked. <= /td>
lockedBy - User The user that locked this comment thread.
moderatedByAdmin - Boolea= n! Returns a boolean indicating whether this comm= ent thread was moderated by an admin.
moderationStatus - CommentThreadModerationStatus! The moderation status of this comment thread. =
owner - User! The thread owner
Example
{
  "comments": CommentConnection,
  "id": "4",
  "lockedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "lockedBy": User,
  "moderatedByAdmin": false,
  "moderationStatus": "none",
  "owner"=
: User
}
Types<= /a>

CommentThreadModerationStatus<= /h2>
Description

Enum for available thread moderation states: "none", "= locked"

Values
Enum Value Description

none

 The comment thread is not under moderation.

locked

 The comment thread cannot be interacted with. =
Example
"none"

Types<= /a>

e}

CsamDeletionRequest

Description

A CSAM Deletion Request

Fields
Field Name Description
createdAt - DateTime! Timestamp when the request was created
csamUrls - String!<= /a> List of CSAM URL IDs to be deleted
id - ID! ID of the CSAM Deletion Request
requesterMemberId - ID!= ID of the user who made the request
status - CsamDeletionRequestStatus! Current status of the request
Example
{
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "csamUrls": "xyz789",
  "id": 4=
,
  "requesterMemberId": 4,
  "status": "PENDING"
}
Types<= /a>

CsamDeletionRequestCDNFilePath= Result

Description

A CSAM Deletion Request file path result from a CDN

Fields
Input Field Description
path - String! The file path that was processed
status= - String! The status of the file path processing (e.g., = "deleted", "failed", "not_found")
message - String! A message about the processing of the file pat= h
Example
{
  "path":=
 "xyz789",
  "status": "abc123",
  "message": "xyz789"
}
Types<= /a>

CsamDeletionRequestCDNResult
Description

A CSAM Deletion Request status update from a CDN

Fields
Input Field Description
hostname - String! CDN hostname
processedAt - DateTime! Timestamp when the CDN processed the request <= /td>
summary - CsamDeletionRequest= CDNSummary! A summary of the results from a CSAM Deletion = Request processed by a CDN
results - [CsamDeletionRequ= estCDNUrlResult!]! List of individual URL deletion results
Example
{
  "hostname": "abc123",
  "processedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "summary": CsamDeletionRequestCDNSummary=
,
  "results": [CsamDeletionRequestCDNUrlResult]
}

Types<= /a>

CsamDeletionRequestCDNSummary<= /h2>
Description

A summary of the results from a CSAM Deletion Request = processed by a CDN

Fields
Input Field Description
total<= /span> - Int! Total number of URLs processed by the CDN
succeeded - Int! Number of URLs successfully
failed= - Int! Number of URLs that failed to be deleted by th= e CDN
Example
{"total": 123, "succeeded": =
123, "failed": 123}

Types<= /a>

CsamDeletionRequestCDNUrlResul= t

Description

A CSAM Deletion Request status update for a url from a= CDN

Fields
Input Field Description
url - String! The URL that was processed by the CDN
success - Boolean! Whether the URL was successfully processed
message - String! A message from the CDN about the processing of= the URL
filePaths - [CsamDelet= ionRequestCDNFilePathResult!]! List of file paths that were processed for thi= s URL
foundCount - Int! Number of file paths found for this URL
deletedCount<= /code> - Int! Number of file paths successfully deleted for = this URL
failedCount - Int! Number of file paths that failed to be deleted= for this URL
Example
{
  "url":<=
/span> "abc123",
  "success": false<=
/span>,
  "message": "abc123",
  "filePaths": [CsamDeletionRequestCDNFilePathResult],
  "foundCount": 987,
  "deletedCount": 123,
  "failedCount": 123
}
Types<= /a>

CsamDeletionRequestStatus

Description

Status of a CSAM Deletion Request

Values
Enum Value Description

PENDING

IN_PROGRESS_BACKBLAZE

IN_PROGRESS_CDN

IN_PROGRESS_CLOUDFLARE_CACHE

COMPLETED_SUCCESSFULLY

COMPLETED_WITH_FAILURES
Example
"PENDING"
Types<= /a>

Endorsement

Description

An Endorsement

Fields
Field Name Description
modelId - BigInt!<= /a> Id of endorsed entity
modelType - String!= Type of endorsed entity
status - String!<= /a> Endorsement status: abstained/endorsed
userId - Int! The database ID for this endorsement.

{
  "modelId": {},
  "modelType": "xyz789",
  "status": "abc123",
  "userId": 123
}
Types<= /a>

ExistsFilter

Description

Filter for checking if a field exists (is not null) or= does not exist (is null)

Fields
Input Field Description
op - FilterComparisonOperato= rExists! Comparison operator: EXISTS or NOT_EXISTS.
Example
{"op": "EXISTS"}
Types<= /a>

ExternalResource

Description

A mod file that is not hosted on Nexus Mods

Fields
Field Name Description
author - String Similar to the author field in the mod details= . So this is not the uploader and may not be an actual user account on the = page. Will often be unassigned for external resources
collectionRevisionId - Int! The database ID for this revision.
fileExpression - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-String">String! Glob pattern that must then match the archive = file name. In cases where the collection asks for a non-exact version (e.g.= : 1.2.4 or newer) where we can't look at the hash of the expected file, thi= s can be used to determine if the mod is already installed/downloaded local= ly.
id - Int! The database ID for this external resource.
instructions - <= span class=3D"property-type">String Deprecated = This field is no longer being used
name - String!<= /span> Name of this resource
optional - Boolean! If true, this is an optional resource
resourceType - String! Resource type. This can be one of "direct" (A = url to download directly from), "browse" (A website url for the user to bro= wse and manually select the right file on), "manual" (Vortex will just show= instructions for the user to create/acquire the mod manually).
resourceUrl - String Only set in the "browse"/"direct" types, conta= ins the url to browse to/download from
version - String The version of the mod that the curator had in= stalled at the time of uploading the collection.
Example
{
  "author": "abc123",
  "collectionRevisionId": 987,
  "fileExpression": "abc123",
  "id": 987,
  "instructions": "abc123",
  "name":=
 "abc123",
  "optional": false=
,
  "resourceType": "abc123",
  "resourceUrl": "abc123",
  "version": "xyz789"
}
Types<= /a>

ExternalVideo

Description

An external video.

Fields
Field Name Description
embedUrl - String!<= /a> The embed URL for the video.
id - ID! The external video ID.
platform - = ExternalVideoPlatform! The platform where the video is hosted.

title - String!= The title of the video.
Example
{
  "embedUrl": "abc123",
  "id": 4=
,
  "platform": "youtube",

  "title"=
: "abc123"
}

FileHash

Description

A Mod File Hash

Fields
Field Name Description
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this file was first created.
fileName - String!<= /a> Name of the file
fileSize - BigInt!<= /a> Filesize in bytes
fileType - String!<= /a> Type of file
gameId - Int! The database ID for this game.
md5 - String! MD5 Checksum of the file
modFile - ModFile= Mod file object
modFileId - Int! The database ID for this file.
Example
{
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "fileName": "abc123",
  "fileSize": {},
  "fileType": "abc123",
  "gameId": 123,
  "md5":<=
/span> "xyz789",
  "modFile": ModFile,
  "modFileId": 123
}
Types<= /a>

FilterComparisonOperator

Description

Filter comparison operators for elastic search queries= .

Values
Enum Value Description

EQUALS

NOT_EQUALS

MATCHES

 Matches if all terms in the value are present = (in any order). No wildcarding, though stems may match.

WILDCARD

 Matches if all terms in the value are present = (in any order), with leading/trailing wildcards applied.

GT

 Greater than

GTE

 Greater than or equal to

LT

 Less than

LTE

 Less than or equal to
Example
"EQUALS"
Types<= /a>

FilterComparisonOperatorEquals= Matches

Description

Filter comparison equals and matches operators for ela= stic search queries.

Values
Enum Value Description

EQUALS

NOT_EQUALS

MATCHES

 Matches if all terms in the value are present = (in any order). No wildcarding, though stems may match.
Example
"EQUALS"
Types<= /a>

FilterComparisonOperatorEquals= Wildcard

Description

Filter comparison equals and matches operators for ela= stic search queries.

Values
Enum Value Description

EQUALS

NOT_EQUALS

WILDCARD

 Matches if all terms in the value are present = (in any order), with leading/trailing wildcards applied.
Example
"EQUALS"
Types<= /a>

FilterComparisonOperatorExists=

Description

Filter comparison operator for exists elastic search q= ueries.

Values
Enum Value Description

EXISTS

 Matches if the field contains any non-null val= ue.

NOT_EXISTS

 Matches if the field is null or does not exist= .
Example
"EXISTS"
Types<= /a>

FilterComparisonOperatorNumeri= c

Description

Filter comparison equals and matches operators for ela= stic search queries.

Values
Enum Value Description

EQUALS

NOT_EQUALS

GT

 Greater than

GTE

 Greater than or equal to

LT

 Less than

LTE

 Less than or equal to
Example
"EQUALS"
Types<= /a>

FilterLogicalOperator

Description

Filter logical operators for elastic search queries.

Values
Enum Value Description

AND

 Logical AND

OR

 Logical OR
Example
"AND"
Types<= /a>

Float

Description

Represents signed double-precision fractional values a= s specified by IEEE 754.

Example
123.45

ALS"}

ForumTopic

Description

A forum topic

Fields
Field Name Description
approved - Boolean! If true, this topic has been approved
description - String! Description
forumId - Int! The database ID for this forum.
id - Int! The database ID for this forum topic.
pinned - Boolean! If true, this topic is pinned and should appea= r above all non-pinned topics
posts - [ForumPost!] List of all posts within this topic
postsCount - Int!<= /span> Number of posts in the topic
state - String!= State of this topic, can be open or closed
title - String!= Title for this topic
titleSeo - String!<= /a> SEO-specific title for this topic
topicUrl - String URL for this topic
views - Int! Number of views this topic has received
visible - String!<= /a> TODO
Example
{
  "approved": true<=
/span>,

  "id": 123,

  "posts"=
: [ForumPost],

: "xyz789",
  "title"=
: "xyz789",

: 987,
  "visible": "xyz789"
}

Game

Description

A Game

Fields
Field Name Description
approvedAt - DateTime Time that this game was approved, after being = submitted by a community member
artworkSchema - GameArtworkSchema Schema for game artwork (V1 for game tile only= , V2 for multiple artwork assets).
availableTags - [Tag!]= Tags available for collections under this spec= ific game, including global tags.
collectionCount - = Int<= /a> Number of collections within this game
copyrightedName - = Boolean= ! True if the name of this game is a copyrighted= asset
domainName - String! Nexus-specific domain name, used to separate g= ames on the Nexus Mods website.
downloadCount - BigInt Number of total downloads for mods in this gam= e
forumUrl - String URL to the game's forum
genre - String<= /span> Genre of this game
id - Int! The database ID for this game.
imageCount - Int Number of uploaded images within this game
mediaCount - Int Number of uploaded images, supporter images, a= nd videos within this game
modCount - Int Number of mods within this game
name - String!<= /span> Name of this game
specificTags - [Tag!]<= /a> Tags only available for collections under this= specific game.
supporterImageCount - Int Number of uploaded supporter images within thi= s game
supportsVortex - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Boolean">Boolean!= Whether this game supports Vortex mod installa= tion
trendingPeriodDays - Int! Number of days to consider for trending mods <= /td>
uniqueDownloadCount - BigI= nt Number of total unique downloads for mods in t= his game
videoCount - Int Number of uploaded videos within this game
Example
{
  "approvedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "artworkSchema": "V1",
  "availableTags": [Tag],
  "collectionCount": 123,
  "copyrightedName": true,
  "domainName": "abc123",
  "downloadCount": {},
  "forumUrl": "xyz789",
  "genre"=
: "abc123",
  "id": 123,
  "imageCount": 123,
  "mediaCount": 987,
  "modCount": 987,
  "name":=
 "xyz789",
  "specificTags": [Tag],
  "supporterImageCount": 123,
  "supportsVortex": false,
  "trendingPeriodDays": 987,
  "uniqueDownloadCount": {},
  "videoCount": 123
}
Types<= /a>

GameArtwork

Description

Game artwork is set individually. This describes the s= chema for the artwork.

Fields
Field Name Description
schemaV1 - Artwor= kSchemaV1! V1 prior to May 2025, using one tile image.
schemaV2 - Artwor= kSchemaV2! V2 introduced May 2025, comprising tile, hero,= and thumbnail images.
Example
{
  "schemaV1": ArtworkSchemaV1,
  "schemaV2": ArtworkSchemaV2
}
Types<= /a>

Description

Schema for managing game artwork

Values
Enum Value Description

V1

V2

"V1"

ID

Description

Represents a unique identifier that is Base64 obfuscat= ed. It is often used to refetch an object or as key for a cache. The ID typ= e appears in a JSON response as a String; however, it is not intended to be= human-readable. When expected as an input type, any string (such as = "VXNlci0xMA=3D=3D") or integer (such as 4) input value = will be accepted as an ID.

Example
"4"
Types<= /a>

ISO8601DateTime

An ISO 8601-encoded datetime

ISO8601DateTime

LegacyTag

Description

A Tag

Fields
Field Name Description
blockable - Boolean! If true, this tag is blockable by the user
games - GameConnec= tion Games this tag is used for. Will be nil if glo= bal is true, as this tag would apply to all games
Argument= s
after - Stri= ng

Returns the elements in the list that co= me after the specified cursor.

before - Str= ing

Returns the elements in the list that co= me before the specified cursor.

first - Int

Returns the first n elements fr= om the list.

last - Int

Returns the last n elements fro= m the list.
global - Boolean! If true, this Tag is global and not intended f= or a specific game
id - ID! ID of this tag
name - String!<= /span> Name of this tag
parentId - ID ID of the parent tag, if any
searchable - Boolean! If true, this tag can be searched on by users =
Example
{
  "blockable": true=
,
  "games"=
: GameConnection,
  "global": true,
  "id": "4",
  "name":=
 "xyz789",
  "parentId": 4,
  "searchable": tru=
e
}
Types<= /a>

paypal - String!<= /a> The user's PayPal email address.
Example

  "donateAuthorpremium": true,
  "donateOwnpremium": false,
  "donatePremiumMax": 987,
  "donateProfile": =
false,

MediaSearchFilter

Description

Filter fields specific to the legacy media search quer= y.

Fields
Input Field Description
filter= - [MediaSearchFilter!]<= /span> Nested filters.
op - FilterLogicalOperator= Logical operator for clauses.
gameId= - [BaseFilterValue!] Filter media by Game ID
gameName - [BaseFilterValue!] Filter media by Game name
createdAt - [BaseFilterValue!] Date created, in unix timestamp
adultContent<= /code> - [BooleanFilterValue!] Filter media by adult content
type - [BaseFilterValue!] Type of media item ("image", "supporter_image"= or "video")
owner<= /span> - [BaseFilterValue!] Filter media by ID of the uploader
mediaStatus - [BaseFilterValue!]= Media status. Valid values are "published", "u= nder_moderation" (moderators/admins only), "hidden" (for images moderator/a= dmin only)
generalSearch= - [MediaGeneral= SearchFilterValue!] Text search on title and description, partial = match.
Example
{
  "filter": [MediaSearchFilter],
  "op": "AND",
  "gameId": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameName": [BaseFilterValue],
  "createdAt": [BaseFilterValue],
  "adultContent": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "type":=
 [BaseFilterValue],
  "owner"=
: [BaseFilterValue],
  "mediaStatus": [BaseFilterValue],
  "generalSearch": [MediaGeneralSearchFilterValue]
}
Types<= /a>

MediaSearchSort

Description

Sort fields specific to the media query.

Fields
Input Field Description
createdAt - BaseSortValue Sort for 'new'.
rating= - BaseSortValue Sort for 'trending'.
views<= /span> - BaseSortValue Sort for 'popular'.
random= - RandomSortValue Sort for 'surprise'.
Example
{
  "createdAt": BaseSortValue,
  "rating": BaseSortValue,
  "views"=
: BaseSortValue,
  "random": RandomSortValue
}
Types<= /a>

 Publicly visible

under_moderation

 Under moderation

hidden

 Hidden

Field Name Description

Mod

Description

A mod

Fields
Field Name Description
adult - Boolean If true, this mod contains adult content Deprecated in favour of adult_content.
adultContent - Boolean If true, this mod contains adult content
author - String Author of this mod
category - String!<= /a> Category name of this mod
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this mod was first created.
description - String! A detailed description of this mod
directDownloadEnabled - B= oolean! If true, this mod can be downloaded without fi= rst visiting the Nexus site
downloads - Int! Download count of this mod
endorsements - Int! Endorsement count of this mod
fileSize - Int Size of the primary mod file in kilobytes
game - Game! Game changed by this mod
gameId - Int! The database ID for this game.
id - ID! The database ID for this mod.
isBlockedFromEarningDp - = Boolean If true, this mod is blocked from earning DP <= /td>
legacyModRequirementsEnabled - = Boolean! If true, this mod uses the legacy mod requirem= ents model
mirrors - [ModMirror!]= Mirrors for this mod
modCategory - ModCate= gory A mod category
modId - Int! The database ID for this mod.
modRequirements - = ModRequirements! Requirements of this mod
name - String!<= /span> Name of this mod
pictureUrl - String= URL for the main mod image
status - String!<= /a> Status of this mod
summary - String!<= /a> A brief summary of this mod
supportsVortex - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Boolean">Boolean!= If true, this mod can be installed using Vorte= x
tags - [LegacyTag!]! Tags associated with this mod
thumbnailBlurredUrl - Stri= ng URL for the blurred thumbnail mod image
thumbnailLargeBlurredUrl - String URL for the large blurred thumbnail mod image =
thumbnailLargeUrl - String= URL for the large thumbnail mod image
thumbnailUrl - String URL for the thumbnail mod image
uid - ID! The database ID for this mod.
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this mod was last updated.
uploader - User!<= /span> Uploader of this mod
version - String!<= /a> Version of this mod
viewerBlocked - Boolean!<= /code> True if the viewer (current user) has blocked = this mod
viewerDownloaded - DateT= ime A timestamp indicating the last time the user = downloaded this mod
viewerEndorsed - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Boolean">Boolean<= /code> True indicates endorsement, false for abstenti= on. Will be null if the user has not endorsed the mod
viewerIsBlocked - = Boolean= True if the viewer (current user) is blocked f= rom interacting with this mod
viewerTracked - Boolean!<= /code> If true, the viewer (current user) is tracking= this mod.
viewerUpdateAvailable - B= oolean True if the mod has been updated since the vie= wer (current user) downloaded it
Example
{
  "adult"=
: true,
  "adultContent": t=
rue,
  "author": "xyz789",
  "category": "abc123",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "description": "abc123",
  "directDownloadEnabled": true,
  "downloads": 987,
  "endorsements": 987,
  "fileSize": 123,
  "game":=
 Game,
  "gameId": 987,
  "id": "4",
  "isBlockedFromEarningDp": true,
  "legacyModRequirementsEnabled": false,
  "mirrors": [ModMirror],
  "modCategory": ModCategory,
  "modId"=
: 123,
  "modRequirements": ModRequirements,
  "name":=
 "xyz789",
  "pictureUrl": "abc123",
  "status": "abc123",
  "summary": "abc123",
  "supportsVortex": false,
  "tags":=
 [LegacyTag],
  "thumbnailBlurredUrl": "xyz789",
  "thumbnailLargeBlurredUrl": "abc123",
  "thumbnailLargeUrl": "abc123",
  "thumbnailUrl": "xyz789",
  "uid":<=
/span> "4",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "uploader": User,
  "version": "xyz789",
  "viewerBlocked": =
true,
  "viewerDownloaded": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "viewerEndorsed": true,
  "viewerIsBlocked": false,
  "viewerTracked": =
false,
  "viewerUpdateAvailable": false
}
Types<= /a>

ModAffiliation

Description

The affiliation of user to a mod

Values
Enum Value Description

OWNER

 The owner of the mod

CONTRIBUTOR

 A contributor to the mod
Example
"OWNER"

Description

The mod analytics for a specific month

Fields
Field Name Description
month - Int! Month
totalDownloads - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-BigInt">BigInt! Total downloads
uniqueDownloads - = BigInt!<= /code> Unique downloads
year - Int! Year
Example
{"month": 123, "totalDownloa=
ds": {}, "uniqueDownloads": {}, "year": 987}
Types<= /a>

ModAnalyticsByMonthPage

Description

A page of mod analytics grouped by month

Fields
Field Name Description
nodes - [= ModAnalyticsByMonthNode!]! A list of mod analytics by month nodes
pageInfo - Of= fsetBasedPageInfo! Information about the page
totalDownloads - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-BigInt">BigInt! The total number of downloads for mods with wh= ich this user is affiliated
totalUniqueDownloads - Big= Int! The total number of unique downloads for mods = with which this user is affiliated
Example
{
  "nodes"=
: [ModAnalyticsByMonthNode]<=
span class=3D"hljs-punctuation">,
  "pageInfo": OffsetBasedPageInfo,
  "totalDownloads": {},
  "totalUniqueDownloads": {}
}
Types<= /a>

ModAnalyticsByMonthSortBy

Description

Attributes to sort by for mod analytics by month

Values
Enum Value Description

DATE

 Sort by date

TOTAL_DOWNLOADS

 Sort by total downloads

UNIQUE_DOWNLOADS

 Sort by total unique downloads
Example
"DATE"

uniqueDownloads - = BigInt!<= /code> Unique downloads

{"mod": Mod, "totalDownloa=
ds": {}, "uniqueDownloads": {}}

ModAnalyticsForMonthPage

Field Name Description

: [ModAnalyticsForMonthNode]=
,

 Sort by total downloads

ModCategory

Description

A mod category

Fields
Field Name Description
categoryId - Int!<= /span> The database ID for this mod category.
date - Int Unix timestamp of category creation
gameId - Int! The database ID for this game.
id - ID! Comma separated mod category id and game id
name - String!<= /span> Name of this category
tags - String Comma separated list of legacy tag IDs These tag identifiers are no longer used
Example
{
  "categoryId": 987,
  "date":=
 987,
  "gameId": 987,
  "id": "4",
  "name":=
 "abc123",
  "tags":=
 "xyz789"
}

: [ModEndorserEdge],

 User

ModFile

Description

Files belonging to a mod

Fields
Field Name Description
category - ModFil= eCategory! The database ID for this File category.
categoryId - Int!<= /span> The database ID for this File category.
changelogText - [String!]!= Patch notes for this mod file version
count - Int! Number of downloads for this file
date - Int! Unix Timestamp for when this file was uploaded=
description - String Description for this file
fileId - Int! Forms a composite key with the game_id
game - Game! Game that this file relates to
groupId - Int Group ID for this file
id - ID! ID of the object.
manager - Int! If true, this file can be downloaded by a mod = manager
mod - Mod! Mod that this file belongs to
modId - Int! The database ID for this mod.
name - String!<= /span> File name
owner - User! User that uploaded this file
primary - Int! If true, this file is the primary file for the= mod
reportLink - String! URL for reporting this file
requirementsAlert - Int! If true, popup will be displayed for showing t= he requirements
scanned - Int! If true, this file has been virus scanned
scannedV2 - Virus= ScanStatus! Status of virus scanning on this file
size - Int! Size of this file, in kilobytes
sizeInBytes - BigInt Size of this file, in bytes
totalDownloads - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Int">Int!<= /a> Number of downloads for this file
uCount - Int! Number of unique downloads for this file
uid - ID! Unique ID for this file
uniqueDownloads - = Int!= Number of unique downloads for this file
uri - String! URL to download this file
version - String!<= /a> Version this file relates to
Example
{
  "category": "MAIN",
  "categoryId": 987,
  "changelogText": ["xyz789"],
  "count"=
: 987,
  "date":=
 987,
  "description": "xyz789",
  "fileId": 123,
  "game":=
 Game,
  "groupId": 987,
  "id": 4=
,
  "manager": 123,
  "mod":<=
/span> Mod,
  "modId"=
: 123,
  "name":=
 "xyz789",
  "owner"=
: User,
  "primary": 987,
  "reportLink": "abc123",
  "requirementsAlert": 123,
  "scanned": 987,
  "scannedV2": "NOT_SCANNED",
  "size":=
 123,
  "sizeInBytes": {},
  "totalDownloads": 987,
  "uCount": 987,
  "uid":<=
/span> 4,
  "uniqueDownloads": 987,
  "uri":<=
/span> "abc123",
  "version": "xyz789"
}
Types<= /a>

Used to flag a mod file as a main, old or archived fil= e.

Enum Value Description

UPDATE

MISCELLANEOUS

REMOVED

ARCHIVED

ModFileContentPage

Fields
Field Name Description
facets - [NodesFacet= !] Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested.
facetsData - JSON= Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested. Schema is {"facetName":{"facetValue":count}}
nodes - [ModFileCo= ntent!]! Nodes for pagination
nodesCount - Int!<= /span> Number of nodes returned by this query
nodesFacets - [NodesFa= cet!] Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested.
nodesFilter - String String representation of the filter query used= to locate the nodes.

  "facets": [NodesFacet],

: [ModFileContent],

ModFileContentSearchFilter
Fields
Input Field Description
filter= - [ModFileContentSearchFi= lter!] Nested filters.
op - FilterLogicalOperator= Logical operator for clauses.
fileId= - [IntFilterValue!]
modId<= /span> - [IntFilterValue!]
gameId= - [IntFilterValue!]
filePathWildc= ard - [BaseFilte= rValueEqualsWildcard!]
filePathParts= Exact - [BaseFilt= erValueEqualsMatches!]
fileNameWildc= ard - [BaseFilte= rValueEqualsWildcard!]
fileExtension= Exact - [BaseFilt= erValueEqualsMatches!]
fileSize - [BaseFilterValueNumeric!]=
Example
{
  "filter": [ModFileContentSearchFilter],
  "op": "AND",
  "fileId": [IntFilterValue],
  "modId"=
: [IntFilterValue],
  "gameId": [IntFilterValue],
  "filePathWildcard": [BaseFilterValueEqualsWildcard],
  "filePathPartsExact": [BaseFilterValueEqualsMatches],
  "fileNameWildcard": [BaseFilterValueEqualsWildcard],
  "fileExtensionExact": [BaseFilterValueEqualsMatches],
  "fileSize": [BaseFilterValueNumeric]
}

Types<= /a>

: BaseSortValue,

,

: "abc123",

ModSource

Description

Used to define the source of a mod. Useful for informi= ng Collections how to retrieve mods.

Values
Enum Value Description

nexus

 The Nexus website

direct

 A direct url to download from

browse

 A general url to find the mod (further instruc= tions may be provided)

manual

 Manual instructions for installing the mod

bundle

 Mod files are included in the collection asset= file, and do not need to be acquired separately
Example
"nexus"
Types<= /a>

ModUpload

Description

An upload

Fields
Field Name Description
claimed - Boolean= If true, this file has been claimed by a user =
contentPreviewGenerated - Boolean If true, the content preview has been generate= d for this upload
createdAt - String!= Time of when this upload was first created.
discardedAt - String Time of when this upload was discarded.
fileChunksReassembled - B= oolean If true, this file has been reassembled from t= he uploaded chunks
fileId - Int Forms a composite key with the game_id
game - Game A Game
hasAlternateDataStreams - Boolean If true, NTFS alternate data streams were dete= cted in this upload
id - String! The database ID for this upload.
internalVirusScanStatus - Int= The virus scanning status of this upload, prov= ided by our internal virus scanning tools
magicBytesScanStatus - Int The magic bytes scan status of this upload
md5 - String The MD5 hash for this object in our object sto= re
modFile - ModFile= Files belonging to a mod
modId - Int The database ID for this mod.
s3UploadComplete - Boolea= n If true, this file has been uploaded to object= store
s3Url - String<= /span> The URL for this object in our object store
sha256 - String The HAS256 hash for this object in our object = store
sizeBytes - String<= /a> The size of this upload in bytes
systemFileName - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-String">String System filename for this upload
tempFileName - String! Temporary filename for this upload
updatedAt - String!= Time of when this upload was last updated.
uploadType - String= Type of upload
user - User A Nexus Mods user
virusTotalPositives - Int Number of positive reports from VirusTotal
virusTotalStatus - Int= The virus scanning status of this upload, prov= ided by VirusTotal
virusTotalUrl - String The URL of the VirusTotal report for this uplo= ad
yaraScanStatus - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Int">Int The YARA scan status of this upload
Example
{
  "claimed": true,
  "contentPreviewGenerated": true,
  "createdAt": "xyz789",
  "discardedAt": "xyz789",
  "fileChunksReassembled": true,
  "fileId": 123,
  "game":=
 Game,
  "hasAlternateDataStreams": true,
  "id": "xyz789",
  "internalVirusScanStatus": 123,
  "magicBytesScanStatus": 987,
  "md5":<=
/span> "xyz789",
  "modFile": ModFile,
  "modId"=
: 987,
  "s3UploadComplete": true,
  "s3Url"=
: "abc123",
  "sha256": "abc123",
  "sizeBytes": "xyz789",
  "systemFileName": "abc123",
  "tempFileName": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "abc123",
  "uploadType": "abc123",
  "user":=
 User,
  "virusTotalPositives": 987,
  "virusTotalStatus": 123,
  "virusTotalUrl": "abc123",
  "yaraScanStatus": 123
}

Moderation

Description

A moderation entry

Fields
Field Name Description
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this moderation was first created= .
editable - Boolean! If true, this moderation entry can be edited <= /td>
id - ID! The database ID for this moderation.

moderatableType - = Mod= eratable! Polymorphic Type of the entity that is being m= oderated
moderationFixes - = [= ModerationFix!] Array of fixes applied for this moderation
moderationReason - ModerationReason! Reason for placing this entity into moderation=
staffId - ID! The database ID for this staff member.
staffNote - String<= /a> Content for the staff note
unlockedAt - DateTime Date this entity was unlocked
unlockedBy - ID User that unlocked this entity
unlockedNote - String Content for the message to show when unlocked =
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this moderation was last updated.=
user - User! Staff member that put this entity into moderat= ion
userNote - String Content for the user note
Example
{
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "editable": true<=
/span>,
  "id": 4=
,
  "moderatableId": 4,
  "moderatableType": "Collection",
  "moderationFixes": [ModerationFix]<=
span class=3D"hljs-punctuation">,
  "moderationReason": ModerationReason,
  "staffId": "4",
  "staffNote": "xyz789",
  "unlockedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "unlockedBy": 4,
  "unlockedNote": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "user":=
 User,
  "userNote": "xyz789"
}

ModerationFix

Description

A moderation fix submission

Fields
Field Name Description
author - User!<= /span> User who authored this moderation fix
authorId - ID! ID of the user who authored this moderation fi= x
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this moderation fix was first cre= ated.
description - String Description of this moderation fix
id - ID! The database ID for this moderation fix.
moderation - Moderatio= n! Type of moderation fix
status - Mo= derationFixStatus! Status of this moderation fix
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this moderation fix was last upda= ted.
Example
{
  "author": User,
  "authorId": 4,
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "description": "xyz789",
  "id": 4=
,
  "moderation": Moderation,
  "status": "submitted",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z"
}
Types<= /a>

ModerationFixStatus

Description

Available moderation fix statuses

Values
Enum Value Description

submitted

 Awaiting an Admin's approval

accepted

 An Admin has accepted this fix

rejected

 An Admin has rejected this fix
Example
"submitted"
Types<= /a>

ModerationReason

Description

A moderation reason

Fields
Field Name Description
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this moderation reason was first = created.
id - ID! The database ID for this moderation reason.
reason - String!<= /a> Reason for moderation
resolution - String= Resolution of the moderation
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this moderation reason was last u= pdated.
Example
{
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "id": "4",
  "reason": "abc123",
  "resolution": "xyz789",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z"
}
Types<= /a>

ModerationRestrictionInput
Description

A moderation restriction

Fields
Input Field Description
restriction - ModerationRestrictions= ! Reason
timeframe - Int! Timeframe in days
modId<= /span> - ID Mod ID
gameId= - ID Game ID
Example
{
  "restriction": "FILE_UPLOAD",
  "timeframe": 123,
  "modId"=
: "4",
  "gameId": "4"
}

ModerationRestrictions

Description

Moderation restriction types

Values
Enum Value Description

FILE_UPLOAD

MOD_TOOLS

FILE_DOWNLOAD

POST

COMMENT_FILE

IMAGE_UPLOAD

ENDORSE_MOD

ENDORSE_MEDIA

BLOCK_PM

ADD_VIDEOS
Example

Types<= /a>

ModerationWarning

Description

A moderation_warning

Fields
Field Name Description
category - ModerationWarningCategoryEnum! Category Id
date - Int! Unix timestamp of moderation warning date
id - ID! The database ID for this moderation warning. <= /td>
isRead - Boolean! Has been read
link - String!<= /span> Moderation warning link
moderationWarningRestrictions - ModerationWarningRestrictionConnectio= n A moderation restriction
Argument= s
after - Stri= ng

Returns the elements in the list that co= me after the specified cursor.

before - Str= ing

Returns the elements in the list that co= me before the specified cursor.

first - Int

Returns the first n elements fr= om the list.

last - Int

Returns the last n elements fro= m the list.
post - ForumPost= Forum post linked to warning
postId - ID Post id of moderation warning
publicReason - String Public reason
reason - String!<= /a> Reason for moderation warning
removedBy - ID User id who removed moderation warning
removedDate - Int<= /span> Removed date of moderation warning
removedReason - String Removed reason
staff - User! Issuer of warning
user - User! User warning has been applied to
Example
{
  "category": "INFORMAL_WARNING",
  "date":=
 123,
  "id": "4",
  "isRead": true,
  "link":=
 "abc123",
  "moderationWarningRestrictions": ModerationWarn=
ingRestrictionConnection,
  "post":=
 ForumPost,
  "postId": 4,
  "publicReason": "xyz789",
  "reason": "xyz789",
  "removedBy": 4,
  "removedDate": 987,
  "removedReason": "abc123",
  "staff"=
: User,
  "user":=
 User
}
Types<= /a>

Description

Moderation warning category types.

Values
Enum Value Description

INFORMAL_WARNING

FORMAL_WARNING

BAN

UNBAN

CLOSE_ACCOUNT

AUTOMATIC_MESSAGE

MANUAL_MESSAGE
Example
"INFORMAL_WARNING"

: [ModerationWarningEdge],

: [ModerationWarning],

ModsFacet

Description

Facet fields specific to the mods query.

Fields
Input Field Description
gameDomainNam= e - [String!] Facet on game domain name.
gameName - [String!] Facet on game name.
gameId= - [String!] Facet on game id.
adult<= /span> - [String!] Facet on adult.
languageName<= /code> - [String!] Facet on language.
status= - [String!] Facet on status.

Example
{
  "gameDomainName": ["abc123"],
  "gameName": ["abc123"],
  "gameId": ["xyz789"],
  "adult"=
: ["abc123"],

  "status": ["abc123"],
  "categoryName": ["xyz789"],
  "tag":<=
/span> ["xyz789"]
}
Types<= /a>

ModsFilter

Description

Filter fields specific to a Mods query

Fields
Input Field Description
filter= - [ModsFilter!] Nested filters.
op - FilterLogicalOperator= Logical operator for clauses.
name - [BaseFilterValueEquals= Wildcard!] Mod name suitable for use with op:wildcard, bu= t not op:matches. Punctuation matched.
nameStemmed - [BaseFilterValue!]= Stemmed name, suitable for token matching (op:= wildcard and op:matches). Punctuation not matched.
modId<= /span> - [BaseFilterValue!] Filter mods by mod ID
id - [BaseFilterValue!] Filter mods by unique identifier (UID)
gameId= - [BaseFilterValue!] Filter mods by Game ID
gameDomainNam= e - [BaseFilterValue!]<= /a> Filter mods by Game domain name
createdAt - [BaseFilterValue!] Date created, in unix timestamp
updatedAt - [BaseFilterValue!] Date updated, in unix timestamp
hasUpdated - [BooleanFilterValue!] Filter mods by whether they have been updated = since they were created
uploaderId - [BaseFilterValue!]<= /span> Filter mods by uploader id
adultContent<= /code> - [BooleanFilterValue!] Filter mods by adult content
fileSize - [IntFilterValue!] Filter mods by file size
downloads - [IntFilterValue!] Filter mods by download count
endorsements<= /code> - [IntFilterValue!]<= /span> Filter mods by endorsement count
tag - [BaseFilterValue!] The tag name, exact match.
description - [BaseFilterValue= EqualsMatches!] The description of the mod
author= - [BaseFilterValue!] The name of the author
uploader - [BaseFilterValue!] The name of the uploader
supportsVorte= x - [BooleanFilterValue!] Filter mods by whether they support Vortex
languageName<= /code> - [BaseFilterValue!] The language of the mod
categoryName<= /code> - [BaseFilterValue!] The mod category
status= - [BaseFilterValue!] The mod status
gameName - [BaseFilterValue!] The name of the game this mod is for
primaryImage<= /code> - [BaseFilterValue!] Filter mods by image, as returned by pictureUr= l and thumbnailUrl.
directDownloa= dEnabled - [BooleanFilterVa= lue!] Filter mods by if they can be downloaded direc= tly without visiting the Nexus site
Example
{
  "filter": [ModsFilter],
  "op": "AND",
  "name":=
 [BaseFilterValueEqualsWildcard],
  "nameStemmed": [BaseFilterValue],
  "modId"=
: [BaseFilterValue],
  "id": [=
BaseFilterValue],
  "gameId": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameDomainName": [BaseFilterValue]=
,
  "createdAt": [BaseFilterValue],
  "updatedAt": [BaseFilterValue],
  "hasUpdated": [BooleanFilterValue]<=
span class=3D"hljs-punctuation">,
  "uploaderId": [BaseFilterValue],
  "adultContent": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "fileSize": [IntFilterValue],
  "downloads": [IntFilterValue],
  "endorsements": [IntFilterValue],
  "tag":<=
/span> [BaseFilterValue],
  "description": [BaseFilterValueEqualsMatches],
  "author": [BaseFilterValue],
  "uploader": [BaseFilterValue],
  "supportsVortex": [BooleanFilterValue],
  "languageName": [BaseFilterValue],
  "categoryName": [BaseFilterValue],
  "status": [BaseFilterValue],
  "gameName": [BaseFilterValue],
  "primaryImage": [BaseFilterValue],
  "directDownloadEnabled": [BooleanFilterValue]
}
Types<= /a>

ModsSort

Description

Sort fields specific to a Mods query.

Fields
Input Field Description
relevance - BaseSortValue Filter query relevance, works best with non wi= ldcard queries.
name - BaseSortValue Mod name.
downloads - BaseSortValue Number of times downloaded.
uniqueDownloa= ds - BaseSortValue Number of unique downloads.
endorsements<= /code> - BaseSortValue Number of times endorsed.
random= - RandomSortValue Random mods.
createdAt - BaseSortValue Date created.
updatedAt - BaseSortValue Date updated.
size - BaseSortValue Mod file size.
lastComment - BaseSortValue Date of last comment.
Example
{
  "relevance": BaseSortValue,
  "name":=
 BaseSortValue,
  "downloads": BaseSortValue,
  "uniqueDownloads": BaseSortValue,
  "endorsements": BaseSortValue,
  "random": RandomSortValue,
  "createdAt": BaseSortValue,
  "updatedAt": BaseSortValue,
  "size":=
 BaseSortValue,
  "lastComment": BaseSortValue
}
Types<= /a>

News

Description

A News article, stored and originally defined by the l= egacy forum

Fields
Field Name Description
author - User!<= /span> Author of this News Article
commentsCount - Int! The number of comments on this article
content - String!<= /a> Content of this news article
date - ISO8601Dat= eTime! Date this news article was created
games - [Game!]!<= /span> Games this news article is related to
header - String The name of the image on the forum
html - Boolean! Is this news article written in HTML?
id - ID! The database ID for this news.
image - String<= /span> The name of the image on the forum
newsCategory - NewsC= ategory! Category of this news article
sourceName - String= If the news article has a source, this is it's= name
sourceUrl - String<= /a> If the news article has a source, this is the = URL
summary - String!<= /a> Summary of this news article
title - String!= Title of this news article
uncroppedHeader - = String The name of the uncropped image on the forum <= /td>
uncroppedImage - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-String">String The name of the uncropped image on the forum <= /td>
Example
{
  "author": User,
  "commentsCount": 123,
  "content": "abc123",
  "date":=
 ISO8601DateTime,
  "games"=
: [Game],
  "header": "abc123",
  "html":=
 false,
  "id": "4",
  "image"=
: "abc123",
  "newsCategory": NewsCategory,
  "sourceName": "xyz789",
  "sourceUrl": "xyz789",
  "summary": "xyz789",
  "title"=
: "xyz789",
  "uncroppedHeader": "abc123",
  "uncroppedImage": "xyz789"
}
Types<= /a>

A news category

Fields
Field Name Description

name - String!<= /span> Name of this category

{"id": 4, "name": "xyz789"}

NewsPage

Fields
Field Name Description
facets - [NodesFacet= !] Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested.
facetsData - JSON= Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested. Schema is {"facetName":{"facetValue":count}}
nodes - [News!]!<= /span> Nodes for pagination
nodesCount - Int!<= /span> Number of nodes returned by this query
nodesFacets - [NodesFa= cet!] Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested.
nodesFilter - String String representation of the filter query used= to locate the nodes.
totalCount - Int!<= /span> Total number of collections found.
Example
{
  "facets": [NodesFacet],
  "facetsData": {},
  "nodes"=
: [News],
  "nodesCount": 123,
  "nodesFacets": [NodesFacet],
  "nodesFilter": "abc123",
  "totalCount": 123
}

Metadata about a single facet value.

Fields
Field Name Description
count - Int! Number of results available for this facet val= ue. Affected by values set on other facets.
facet - String!= Name matching the graphql facet request.
value - String!= Value available for this facet. May be used in= a subsequent facet request to filter the results by facet.
Example
{
  "count"=
: 123,
  "facet"=
: "abc123",
  "value"=
: "abc123"
}

Information about a page of items

Fields
Field Name Description
hasNextPage - Boolean! Whether there is a next page
hasPreviousPage - = Boolean= ! Whether there is a previous page

{
  "hasNextPage": fa=
lse,
  "hasPreviousPage": false,
  "page":=
 123,

  "totalCount": 987
}

llectionBugReport}

OptedInMod

Description

Represents a single opted in mod

Fields
Field Name Description
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this OptedInMod was first created= .
game - Game Game
gameId - Int! The ID of the game the mod belongs to
id - Int! The database ID for this opted in mod.
mod - Mod Mod
modId - Int! ID of the that was opted in
ratio - Float! Ratio of the DP from this mod shared with this= user
uploader - User Uploader of the mod
uploaderId - Int!<= /span> ID of the uploader of the mod. This might not = be the current user, as mod authors can share mod DP with other users.
Example
{
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "game":=
 Game,
  "gameId": 987,
  "id": 123,
  "mod":<=
/span> Mod,
  "modId"=
: 123,
  "ratio"=
: 987.65,
  "uploader": User,
  "uploaderId": 987
}

OptedInMods

A list of mods that this user has been opted into

Field Name Description

entries - [OptedInMod= !]! Mods that have been opted in
user - User! User
userId - Int! ID of the user

{
  "count"=
: 123,
  "entries": [OptedInMod],
  "user":=
 User,
  "userId": 987
}

Information about pagination in a connection.

startCursor - String When paginating backwards, the cursor to conti= nue.

  "hasNextPage": fa=
lse,

  "startCursor": "xyz789"

Preference

Description

A user preference

Fields
Field Name Description
adult - Boolean! Show adult content
adultBlurImages - = Boolean= ! Blur adult images
bubbleReply - Boolean! Replies to posts bump original post
comments - PreferencesCommentsEnum! Amount of comments per page.
defaultMediaTab - = PreferencesDefaultMediaTabEnum! Default media tab.
defaultMediaTabTimeRange - PreferencesTimeRangeEnum! Time range values for preferences.
defaultModsTab - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-PreferencesDefaultModsT= abEnum">PreferencesDefaultModsTabEnum! Default mods tab.
defaultModsTabTimeRange - PreferencesTimeRangeEnum! Time range values for preferences.
defaultOrder - PreferencesDefaultSortEnum! Default sorting option.
defaultSearchType - PreferencesSearchTypeEnum! Default search types
defaultSearchView - PreferencesDefaultSearchViewEnum! Default search view.
disableProfileActivity - = Boolean! Display user activity
displayLastActivity - Boo= lean! Display when user was last active
dlLocation - = PreferencesDlLocationEnum! Download location.
download - PreferencesDownloadMethodEnum! Preferred download method
id - ID! ID of the object.
imageShowcase - PreferencesImageShowcaseEnum! Image showcase.
isBlockingContent - Boole= an! If true, this user is blocking content
marketingEmails - = Boolean= ! Whether the user has opted in to marketing ema= ils
notificationsActive - Boo= lean! Display notifications
notificationsGameSpecific - Boolean! Game specific notifications when visiting game= pages
reminder - PreferencesReminderEnum! Endorsement reminder.
results - PreferencesResultsEnum! Amount of results per page.
subfeedsActivityTracked - Boolean! Activity about tracked files, images and video= s
subfeedsActivityYour - Bo= olean! Activity about a users files, images and video= s
subfeedsAuthorTracked - B= oolean! Author tracked files, images and videos
subfeedsCommentsTracked - Boolean! Comments about tracked files, images and video= s
subfeedsCommentsYour - Bo= olean! Comments about a users files, images and video= s
Example
{
  "adult"=
: false,
  "adultBlurImages": false,
  "bubbleReply": tr=
ue,
  "comments": "COMMENTS_10",
  "defaultMediaTab": "NEW",
  "defaultMediaTabTimeRange": "ALL_TIME",
  "defaultModsTab": "NEW",
  "defaultModsTabTimeRange": "ALL_TIME",
  "defaultOrder": "BY_RECENT_FILES",
  "defaultSearchType": "ALL_CONTENT",
  "defaultSearchView": "STANDARD",
  "disableProfileActivity": false,
  "displayLastActivity": true,
  "dlLocation": "NEXUS_CDN",
  "download": "POP_UP_BOX",
  "id": "4",
  "imageShowcase": "NOT_SET",
  "isBlockingContent": true,
  "marketingEmails": true,
  "notificationsActive": true,
  "notificationsGameSpecific": true,
  "reminder": "NEVER",
  "results": "RESULTS_20",
  "subfeedsActivityTracked": false,
  "subfeedsActivityYour": true,
  "subfeedsAuthorTracked": true,
  "subfeedsCommentsTracked": true,
  "subfeedsCommentsYour": false
}

PublicCollectionChangelog

Description

A public changelog attached to a collection revision. = If you need to access more fields, use CollectionChangelogType instead.

Fields
Field Name Description
collectionRevisionId - Int! The id of the collection revision for which th= is changelog was created
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this collection changelog was fir= st created.
description - String! The content of the collection changelog, in Ma= rkdown format
id - Int! The database ID for this collection changelog.=
revisionNumber - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Int">Int!<= /a> The revision number of the collection revision= for which this changelog was created
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this collection changelog was las= t updated.
Example
{
  "collectionRevisionId": 123,
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "description": "xyz789",
  "id": 987,
  "revisionNumber": 123,
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z"
}
Types<= /a>

Description

A public collection revision type. If you need to acce= ss more fields, use CollectionRevisionType instead.

createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this revision was first created. =
discardedAt - DateTime Time of when this revision was discarded.
id - Int! The database ID for this revision.
overallRating - String An average taken from all ratings for this rev= ision
overallRatingCount - Int A count of all ratings for this revision
rating - AverageRating! Average rating for a single revision and total= number of votes Deprecated in favour of= 'overallRating' and 'overallRatingCount'
revision - Int! The revision number Use revision_number instead.
revisionNumber - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Int">Int!<= /a> The revision number
revisionStatus - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-String">String! The status of this revision. Possible values a= re 'draft', 'published' or 'retracted'
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this revision was last updated. <= /td>
Example
{
  "collectionChangelog": PublicCollectionChangelo=
g,
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "discardedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "id": 123,
  "overallRating": "abc123",
  "overallRatingCount": 987,
  "rating": AverageRating,
  "revision": 987,
  "revisionNumber": 987,
  "revisionStatus": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z"
}
Types<= /a>

Field Name Description
success - Boolean! Success Boolean

{"success": false}

ue,

Tag

Description

The definition of a Tag Object. Deprecated. Will be re= moved in a future release in favour of domain specific tag queries/mutation= s

Fields
Field Name Description
adult - Boolean! If true, this Tag is intended for adult conten= t
category - TagCategor= y Category that this tag belongs to
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this tag was first created.
discardedAt - DateTime Time of when this tag was discarded.
games - [Game!] List of games that this tag is for
global - Boolean! If true, this Tag is global and not intended f= or a specific game
id - ID! The database ID for this tag.
name - String!<= /span> Name of this tag
taggablesCount - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Int">Int!<= /a> Number of tagged entities for this tag
updatedAt - DateTime! Time of when this tag was last updated.
Example
{
  "adult"=
: false,
  "category": TagCategory,
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "discardedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "games"=
: [Game],
  "global": true,
  "id": 4=
,
  "name":=
 "abc123",
  "taggablesCount": 987,
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z"
}
Types<= /a>

,

Transaction

Description

A transaction

Fields
Field Name Description
amount - Int! Amount of DP in this transaction
createdAt - String!= Time of when this transaction was first create= d.
creditor - String Account/Bank that DP is being sent to Use 'creditorEntity' instead
creditorEntity - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-PaymentEntity">Pa= ymentEntity Account/Bank that DP is being sent to
debitor - String Account/Bank that DP is being taken from Use 'debitorEntity' instead
debitorEntity - Pay= mentEntity Account/Bank that DP is being taken from
id - Int! The database ID for this transaction.
label - String!= Descriptive label for this transaction
type - String!<= /span> Type of transaction E.g. 'refund', 'purchase' = etc
Example
{
  "amount": 987,
  "createdAt": "xyz789",
  "creditor": "abc123",
  "creditorEntity": PaymentEntity,
  "debitor": "abc123",
  "debitorEntity": PaymentEntity,
  "id": 987,
  "label"=
: "abc123",
  "type":=
 "abc123"
}
Types<= /a>

User

Description

A Nexus Mods user

Fields
Field Name Description
about - String<= /span> User's bio
avatar - String!<= /a> The avatar for this user
banned - Boolean! If true, this user has been banned
blockedFromOptingInModsAt - DateTime Timestamp at which user's new mods were blocke= d from earning DP
collectionCount - = Int!= Number of collections uploaded by this user. T= his does not include unlisted or moderated collections.
contributedModCount - Int! The number of mods this user has contributed t= o
country - String ISO Country Code
deleted - Boolean! If true, this user has been deleted
donationsEnabled - Boolea= n! If true, this user has enabled donations on th= eir profile page
dpOptedIn - Boolean! If false, this user has specifically opted-out= of the DP system. By default, all users are opted in.
email - String!= The user's email address. Users can only acces= s their own protected data.
endorsementsGiven - Int! Number of mod endorsements given by this user =
fullPageNotificationCount - I= nt The number of full page notifications this use= r has been served in the past.
hasGivenKudos - Boolean!<= /code> If true, the viewer (current user) has given k= udos to this user.
imageCount - Int!<= /span> Number of images uploaded by this user. This d= oes not include moderated images.
ipAddress - String<= /a> The user's last known IP Address. Users can on= ly access their own protected data.
isBlocked - Boolean! If true, the viewer (current user) has blocked= this user.
isTracked - Boolean! If true, the viewer (current user) is tracking= this user.
joined - DateTime! Date the user joined
kudos - Int! The number of 'kudos' given to this user
lastActive - DateTime Date the user was last active
legacyRoles - [String!]! Legacy roles for this user. Returns an array o= f roles. E.g. "[SiteProgrammer, QA Tester]"
memberId - Int! The database ID for this user.
membershipRoles - = [String!= ]! Membership status for this user. Returns an ar= ray of roles. E.g. all users are "member"
modAnalyticsByMonth - ModAnalyticsByMonthPage! The analytics for the user's mods, grouped by = month
Argument= s
affiliation - ModAffiliation

The affiliation to filter by

page - Int

The page number to retrieve

pageSize - Int<= /code>

The number of results per page

sortBy - ModAnalyticsByMonthSortBy

The field to sort by

sortDirection - SortDirection

The direction to sort by
modAnalyticsForMonth - ModAnalyticsForMonthPage! The analytics for the user's mods for a specif= ic month
Argument= s
year - Int!

The year to retrieve analytics for

month - Int!

The month to retrieve analytics for

query - Stri= ng

Search term to filter mods by

affiliation - ModAffiliation

The affiliation to filter by

page - Int

The page number to retrieve

pageSize - Int<= /code>

The number of results per page

sortBy - ModAnalyticsForMonthSortBy

The field to sort by

sortDirection - SortDirection

The direction to sort by
modCount - Int! Number of mods uploaded by this user. This doe= s not include hidden, moderated or unpublished mods.
moderationHistoryCount - Int<= /code> The number of moderation warnings this user ha= s been served in the past.
moderationJwt - String! JWT token for submitting moderation reports
modsBlockedFromEarningDp - BlockedModsPage! A list of mods blocked from earning dp
Argument= s
count - Int

Number of mods to return

offset - Int

Number of mods to skip
name - String!<= /span> The user's username.
ownedModCount - Int! The number of mods this user has uploaded
paypal - String Email address used for PayPal donations. Users= can only access their own protected data.
posts - Int! The number of forum posts by this user
recognizedAuthor - Boolea= n! If true, this user is a recognised mod author =
roles - [String!]!<= /a> Roles for this user. Returns an array of roles= . E.g. "[Admin, Moderator]"
showActivityFeed - Boolea= n! If true, this user has opted to show their act= ivity feed on their user profile page
showLastActive - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-Boolean">Boolean!= If true, this user has opted to show the date = they were last active on their user profile page
uniqueModDownloads - Int! Number of unique mod downloads on this users m= ods
usernameLastChangedAt - = DateTime Date the user last changed their username. Onl= y users can access their own protected data.
videoCount - Int!<= /span> Number of videos uploaded by this user. This d= oes not include moderated videos.
viewerHasBlocked - Boolea= n Whether the viewer has blocked the content own= er.
viewerHasIgnored - Boolea= n! Whether the viewer has ignored the content own= er.
views - Int! Number of profile views
Example
{
  "about"=
: "abc123",
  "avatar": "abc123",
  "banned": false,
  "blockedFromOptingInModsAt": "2007-12-03T10:1=
5:30Z",

e,

false,

  "isBlocked": fals=
e,

,

  "kudos"=
: 987,
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "legacyRoles": ["xyz789"],
  "memberId": 987,
  "membershipRoles": ["abc123"],
  "modAnalyticsByMonth": ModAnalyticsByMonthPage<=
/span>,

e,

 "abc123",
