UserConnection

Description

The connection type for User.

Fields
Field Name Description
edges - [UserEdge] A list of edges.
nodes - [User] A list of nodes.
pageInfo - PageInfo! Information to aid in pagination.
totalCount - Int!<= /span> Total # of objects returned from this Plural Q= uery
Example
{
  "edges"=
: [UserEdge],
  "nodes"=
: [User],
  "pageInfo": PageInfo,
  "totalCount": 123
}
Types<= /a>

UserEdge

Description

An edge in a connection.

Fields
Field Name Description
cursor - String!<= /a> A cursor for use in pagination.
node - User The item at the end of the edge.
Example
{
  "cursor": "abc123",
  "node":=
 User
}
Types<= /a>

UserMonthlyReport

Description

Monthly detailed report for for a particular user/acco= unt on how much DP/downloads they have received for which mod/game

Fields
Field Name Description
entries - [UserMonthlyReportEntry!]! List of entries in this report
reportType - Donat= ionReport! Type of report
user - User A Nexus Mods user
userId - Int! The database ID for this user.
Example
{
  "entries": [UserMonthlyReportEntry]=
,
  "reportType": "UNIQUE_DOWNLOADS",
  "user":=
 User,
  "userId": 123
}
Types<= /a>

UserMonthlyReportEntry

Description

A more detailed entry for UserMonthlyReport, with a br= eakdown for a specific month for each mod

Fields
Field Name Description
author - User A Nexus Mods user
authorCount - Int<= /span> Number of authors that give this user DP
authorId - Int The database ID for this user.
authorValue - Int<= /span> Total DP value from all authors this user gets= DP from, including DP not shared with this user.
game - Game A Game
gameId - Int The database ID for this game.
mod - Mod A mod
modCount - Int Number of mods that this user appears in
modId - Int The database ID for this mod.
modValue - Int Total DP value from all mods this user appears= in, including DP not shared with this user.
month - Int! Month that this entry is for
ratio - Float! Ratio of how much of the DP earned for a mod o= r author is given to this user
reportId - Int! The database ID for this donation report.
status - Int! Opt-in status of this mod
value - Int! Total DP granted to this user in this entry
year - Int! Year that this entry is for
Example
{
  "author": User,
  "authorCount": 123,
  "authorId": 123,
  "authorValue": 987,
  "game":=
 Game,
  "gameId": 987,
  "mod":<=
/span> Mod,
  "modCount": 987,
  "modId"=
: 123,
  "modValue": 987,
  "month"=
: 987,
  "ratio"=
: 987.65,
  "reportId": 987,
  "status": 987,
  "value"=
: 987,
  "year":=
 987
}
Types<= /a>

Description

Monthly summary for for a particular user/account on h= ow much DP/downloads they have received

Field Name Description

user - User! A Nexus Mods user
userId - Int! The database ID for this user.

 User,

UserMonthlySummaryEntry

An entry for UserMonthlySummary, with a breakdown for = a specific month

Fields
Field Name Description
modCount - Int! Number of mods that this user appears in
modValue - Int! Total DP value from all mods this user appears= in, including DP not shared with this user.
month - Int! Month that this entry is for
reportType - Donat= ionReport! Type of report
value - Int! Total DP granted to this user in this entry
year - Int! Year that this entry is for
Example
{
  "modCount": 987,
  "modValue": 123,
  "month"=
: 123,

  "value"=

 987

UserPage

Fields
Field Name Description
facets - [NodesFacet= !] Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested.
facetsData - JSON= Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested. Schema is {"facetName":{"facetValue":count}}
nodes - [User!]!<= /span> Nodes for pagination
nodesCount - Int!<= /span> Number of nodes returned by this query
nodesFacets - [NodesFa= cet!] Facets available, if supported for this query = and requested.
nodesFilter - String String representation of the filter query used= to locate the nodes.
totalCount - Int!<= /span> Total number of collections found.
Example
{
  "facets": [NodesFacet],
  "facetsData": {},
  "nodes"=
: [User],
  "nodesCount": 987,
  "nodesFacets": [NodesFacet],
  "nodesFilter": "xyz789",
  "totalCount": 123
}
Types<= /a>

UserWarnings

Description

A return type for the current warnings query

Fields
Field Name Description
unreadGlobalNotices - [GlobalNotice!]! List of unread global notices
unreadWarnings - <= a href=3D"https://graphql.nexusmods.com/#definition-ModerationWarning">[ModerationWarning!]! List of unread warnings
Example
{
  "unreadGlobalNotices": [GlobalNotice],
  "unreadWarnings": [ModerationWarning]
}
Types<= /a>

UsersSearchFilter

Description

Filter fields specific to a Users query

Fields
Input Field Description
filter= - [UsersSearchFilter!]<= /span> Nested filters.
op - FilterLogicalOperator= Logical operator for clauses.
nameExact - [BaseFilterValueEq= ualsMatches!] Username.
nameWildcard<= /code> - [BaseFilterValue!] Username.
Example
{
  "filter": [UsersSearchFilter],
  "op": "AND",
  "nameExact": [BaseFilterValueEqualsMatches=
],
  "nameWildcard": [BaseFilterValue]
}
Types<= /a>

UsersSearchSort

Description

Sort fields specific to a Users query.

Fields
Input Field Description
relevance - BaseSortValue Filter query relevance, works best with non wi= ldcard queries.
name - BaseSortValue username
Example
{
  "relevance": BaseSortValue,
  "name":=
 BaseSortValue
}
Types<= /a>

VerificationResult

Description

The result of a query to the age verification flow sta= rt from the API.

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! Age verification flow ID, used to track the ve= rification process
url - String! URL of the age verify widget to embed in the p= age
Example
{"id": 4, "url": "abc123"}
Types<= /a>

Video

Description

A video

Fields
Field Name Description
allowComments - Boolean Whether comments are allowed on the video.
allowRating - Boolean Whether ratings are allowed on the video.
category - VideoCat= egory! An video category
createdAt - DateTime! Time of when this video was first created.
description - String The description of the video.
game - Game! Game this video belongs to
id - ID! ID of the object.
link - String!<= /span> The URL of the video.
mediaStatus - MediaSt= atus! Status of this video
owner - User! Uploader of this video
rating - Int! The rating of the video.
siteUrl - String!<= /a> URL of the site this video is hosted on
thumbnailUrl - String! The URL of the video thumbnail.
title - String<= /span> The title of the video.
viewerBlocked - Boolean!<= /code> True if the viewer (current user) has ignored = this video's author
views - Int! The number of views the video has.
Example
{
  "allowComments": =
false,
  "allowRating": tr=
ue,
  "category": VideoCategory,
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03T10:15:30Z",
  "description": "xyz789",
  "game":=
 Game,
  "id": 4=
,
  "link":=
 "xyz789",
  "mediaStatus": "published",
  "owner"=
: User,

  "siteUrl": "xyz789",
  "thumbnailUrl": "abc123",
  "title"=
: "xyz789",
  "viewerBlocked": =
true,
  "views"=
: 123
}

VideoCategory

Description

An video category

Fields
Field Name Description

id - ID! The database ID for this video category.
name - String!<= /span> Name of this category

{"date": 987, "id": 4, "name"=
: "xyz789"}

VirusScanStatus

Description

Records the outcome of the virus scan for a mod file.<= /p>

Values
Enum Value Description

NOT_SCANNED

QUEUED

WAITING_REPORT

VERIFIED

INTERNALLY_VERIFIED

QUARANTINED

MANUALLY_VERIFIED

MOD_DOES_NOT_EXIST

FILE_NOT_FOUND

REPORT_ERROR

TOO_LARGE
Example
"NOT_SCANNED"
Types<= /a>

WalletList

Description

A list of wallets. Users must have admin access.

Fields
Field Name Description
filteredCount - Int! Number of wallets being filtered
totalCount - Int!<= /span> Total number of wallets in the system
Example
{"filteredCount": 987, "tota=
lCount": 987}
Types<= /a>
